name: agent-skills
description: Multi-domain Claude Code skill and agent library. Kaggle domain: 12 competition skills (adversarial validation, EDA, baselines, Optuna, feature engineering, hill climbing, stacking, pseudo-labeling, seed ensembling) + 3 agents. SDLC domain: 17 agents across 4 phases (requirements → architecture → implementation → review). Finance domain coming soon.
